title: George artist's song goes global thanks to European music network
description: ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - A local musician and...
bodyText:
ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - A local musician and songwriter, Max Gozo, has taken a major leap onto the international stage with his latest single, "All I Need", which has officially been playlisted by the European Music Network's Formula Indie Radio Show.


> The song will now reach audiences across more than 80 radio stations worldwide, spanning continents from Europe and Asia to North America, Africa and Australia.


The Formula Indie Show, produced by the European Indie Music Network, is renowned for spotlighting the best emerging independent artists from around the globe.

"All I Need" will air in countries such as Spain, Italy, France, Japan, Canada, Brazil, the USA and South Africa, solidifying the George-based artist's growing global presence.

"It's surreal to know that a song recorded in my hometown is now being heard across the world," said Gozo.


> "'All I Need' is a testimony of gratitude - about realising that sometimes everything we've been searching for has been within us all along."


The track is a blend of soulful vocals and heartfelt lyrics, and it merges faith, reflection and hope.

Gozo is known locally for his inspiring music and community involvement and is a motivational speaker. His music is known for its powerful storytelling, rooted in faith and real-life experiences that inspire listeners to overcome adversity and embrace their purpose.

Max Gozo

"All I Need" debuted on Monday 13 October and is now available on all streaming platforms.


> Fans can follow the broadcast schedule on www.euroindiemusic.info and connect with Max Gozo via his website, maxgozo.co.za.


Gozo has also published several children's books in which he teaches principles for a successful life in a fun way, and he is working on a book for adults about hope during challenging times.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
